metric_basis: GAAP EBITDA calculated as operating income plus depreciation and definite-lived intangible amortization
notes: Latest full-year financial period publicly available before the transaction announcement.

metric_basis: GAAP EBITDA calculated as operating income plus depreciation/amortization and capitalized software amortization
